description: Single-rendition HLS VOD output exercising typed Output.HLS fields (Wave 3 #12). 1 s segments, fmp4/CMAF segment type, deletion of stale segments, EXT-X-ENDLIST on close (playlist_type=vod). Note: if you edit this JSON manually, you must also update or remove the ffmpeg_cmd field.
ffmpeg_cmd: ffmpeg -i {{input}} -map 0:a:0 -map 0:v:0 -c:v libx264 -c:a aac -map_metadata 0 -map_chapters 0 -f hls -hls_time 1 -hls_playlist_type vod -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_flags independent_segments {{output}}
